title: assembly
description:
Articulated-asset intermediate representation. Consumed by blender_assemble.py and blender_export_usd.py.

Each link stores world-space metric values. blender_assemble.py back-computes the Blender-native scale and origin.xyz at render time using component_dims.json:
  blender_scale[axis]  = world_size[axis] / raw_mesh_size[axis]
  origin_xyz[axis]     = world_center[axis] / parent_blender_scale[axis]
                         − (R(rpy_deg) × (blender_scale × raw_mesh_center))[axis]

For the root link parent_blender_scale = [1, 1, 1]. Children must appear after their parent in the links array.

root.description: Base directory for resolving relative mesh paths (the run directory).

robot_name.description: Name of the assembled object; used as the URDF <robot name>.

parent.description: Name of the parent link; null for the root. Children must appear after their parent in the links array.

visual_mesh.description: GLB path (relative to root or absolute) used for high-quality Blender renders.

collision_mesh.description: Collision mesh path (relative to root or absolute). Use the same GLB as visual_mesh: component_glbs/<name>.glb.

world_size.description: World bounding-box dimensions [W, D, H] in metres. blender_assemble.py derives blender_scale = world_size / raw_mesh_size from component_dims.json.

world_center.description: World-space centre [x, y, z] in metres of the mesh at its current pose (open for revolute/prismatic joints, closed otherwise). blender_assemble.py derives origin.xyz = world_center / parent_blender_scale − R(rpy_deg) × (blender_scale × raw_center).

rpy_deg.description: Pivot rotation in degrees, XYZ Euler [roll, pitch, yaw]. For revolute doors: rpy_deg[2]<0 opens a left-hinged door; rpy_deg[2]>0 opens a right-hinged door. rpy_deg[0]<0 opens a bottom-hinged lid.
